name: Obscured Security-relevant Information by Alternate Name
description: The product logs security events using alternate names rather than canonical names, allowing attackers to obscure their actions. For example, logging a symbolic link name instead of the actual file path being accessed enables an attacker to hide privilege escalation or unauthorized access.
detection_pattern: Look for INGRESS nodes (file access, resource requests via symlinks or aliases) flowing to STORAGE nodes (audit logs) without a TRANSFORM node (name canonicalization, symlink resolution) that resolves alternate names to canonical resource identifiers before logging.
